decision: Infra guardrails: read-only escape hatch for container output on startup failure

steps.action: Infra guardrails: read-only escape hatch for container output on startup failure
steps.notes: Guardrails hook updated: container log tail ≤50 allowed, follow/unbounded blocked. 6/6 test cases pass.
Verified. Escape hatch is clean — docker logs --tail ≤50 allowed for crash diagnostics, follow/unbounded still blocked. Structured logging on all decisions. Correct deny/ask/allow pattern.
